description.value:
You stop holding the door shut. The presence in your blood floods through you: you gain the Communion benefits of your attunement rank, and every Communion active materializes on your sheet alongside the buff — they vanish when Communion ends.

Duration 1 round / 3 rounds / 1 minute by tier (1 round at Trial, 3 rounds at Discipline, 1 minute at Union). When Communion ends — or when you try to end it early — attempt a Will save against the Release DC (your Release DC).

You can Invoke at will, but not while Communion is already running. From attunement 2, Invoking includes a free Stride (Bull's Footing).
